title: Copilot Session Checkpoint: Graphify Comparison and Quality Evaluation

summary: The user is working on labs-wiki, a personal LLM-powered knowledge wiki that auto-ingests sources (URLs, papers, repos) into compiled wiki pages. They asked me to: (1) compare labs-wiki against graphify (safishamsi/graphify) and create a...
